text: Science has a clearer story about EUV lithography than social media does. EUV lithography, or extreme ultraviolet lithography, is a cutting-edge technology used in semiconductor manufacturing. It uses shorter wavelengths of light to create smaller, more complex microchips. These chips power everything from smartphones to advanced AI systems, making them essential in today's tech. However, EUV lithography is still evolving, facing challenges like cost and efficiency. But its potential is huge—imagine faster, smarter devices! Curious to learn more about tech shaping our future? Hit that follow button!
